name: Pineapple Beef Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a bowl and stir until the sugar dissolves.
2. Allow the marinade to sit for an hour so flavors blend well.
3. Place meat in a freezer bag large enough for it to lay flat on one side.
4. Stir the marinade again, ensuring the sugar is dissolved.
5. Pour the mixture into the bag and remove as much air as possible.
6. Allow the meat to marinate overnight, turning the bag several times.
7. This marinade works especially well for grilled steaks!
